programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm
programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: Marjorine
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Ginger Kids: After giving a hate speech against 'the gingers', Cartman awakens the next day with a case of 'Gingervitus' and soon rallies against the persecution of his fellow red heads. (S9, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Free Willzyx
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Smug Alert: Kyle's father buys a new hybrid car but it's not long before his smug levels reach ridiculous levels - must be time to move to San Fran! How will Cartman deal with no Kyle? (S10, E02)

programme.title: South Park: A Million Little Fibers
programme.desc: A Million Little Fibers: Towlie writes his memoirs and it's not long before he's invited onto The Oprah Winfrey Show. (S10, E05)

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Mystery of The Urinal Deuce: Someone defecates in a urinal at school! Cartman rants that it's a conspiracy "like 9/11!" The entire town think so too! Time for a trip to the White House. (S10, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Hell on Earth 2006
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go (Part 1)
programme.desc: Go God Go (1): Cartman is impatient to get his hands on the latest games console. Result? A visit to the atheistic future of 2546! Richard Dawkins pays a visit to South Park Elementary. (S10, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII (Part 2)
programme.desc: Go God Go XII (2): Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Winner robots from rounds one through five battle it out in the arena, a wild card from the runners up throws a spanner in the works as it tries to overthrow attempts at glory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A new spinner has something to prove and a family team pour blood, sweat and tears into keeping their robot wars dream alive. The robots compete through brutal group battles and fierce head to heads for a place in the heat final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The challenge for competitors is even tougher as the infamous House Robots have been let off the leash in a new twist. This is the second heat, and only one of the eight teams can go through to the series grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four teams progress into a mini league going head to head in a bid for points. The top two teams will face each other in the heat final for the chance to secure their place in this series' grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This fourth heat is an explosive display of spinners as old favourites take on new hopefuls. They must dodge the arena hazards and the menacing new twist as house robots are unleashed to attack competitors and inflict maximum damage.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The reigning champions Apollo mount their defence of the title. They face stiff competition from Ms Nightshade, Coyote, Rusty, Crackers'N'Smash, Meggamouse, Trolley Rage and Carbide.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: It is the grand final and the teams must dodge the arena hazards and, in a menacing new twist, they can also hit the Arena Tyre to unleash the dreaded House Robots, allowing them to inflict maximum damage anywhere in the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The teams are Donald Thump, Behemoth, Sabretooth, Apollo, Apocalypse and The Swarm. Along the way they must dodge arena hazards, menacing house robots and the all-new Fog of War.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Returning champions Carbide mount their title defence against some of the toughest machines in the competition. They will have to fight through brutal group battles and nightmarish knockout rounds to make it to the heat final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, the Hypno-Disc competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. The Razer Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight teams made up of families and friends from across the country put their homemade robots to the test inside a purpose-built arena, packed with arena hazards and four House Robots. The winner at the end will go forward to the grand-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The huge axe of Robot Thor driven by Jason, a builder from Northampton, clashes with father-and-son team Will and Ian from Team Shockwave. A consultant cardiologist and his two sons cause a huge upset with their brand new untested robot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An eclectic collection of homemade robots including Glitterbomb, designed by nine-year-old April, which comes complete with a huge pink axe. A team of students from Falkirk bring a robot made of wood with a petrol engine.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sandi & Phil
programme.desc: Sandi and Phil have lived in their park-filled waterfront neighbourhood for years. But with the arrival of their baby boy, they've suddenly outgrown their one-room loft-style apartment, and are searching for a house.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Leslie & Tim
programme.desc: Since they sold their downtown condo, Leslie and Tim have been living with her parents. And though they both agree it's time to move into a home of their own, she prefers the city while he wants to live in the burbs.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kyle & Jackie
programme.desc: Kyle and Jackie are living at her mom's until they find a home of their own. And though they've got a healthy budget, they've set their sights on one of the city's priciest neighborhoods.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Andrew & Phil
programme.desc: Andrew and Phil are engaged and homeless. And as they couch surf their way around the city, these soon-to-be-weds are desperate to find a sprawling downtown home of their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Emily & Ken
programme.desc: With a baby on the way, Emily and Ken are searching for the perfect suburban home close to family. And since their condo sold more quickly than expected, they're crashing in her sister's basement until they find the one

programme.title: Property Brothers: Amanda & Tre
programme.desc: Tre and Amanda have been living in a rental for nearly three years, and as the kids get bigger their temporary home seems to be getting smaller. They’re ready to find a permanent place of their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers: George & Jenn
programme.desc: In order to cut down on his monster commute, George and Jenn want to move closer to family and friends. And while that’s something they both agree on, they’re miles apart when it comes to design.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Rave & Michelle
programme.desc: Along with their two little ones, Rave and Michelle are staying with his parents while hunting for the perfect suburban home. And though they’re a close-knit family, living under one roof is proving too close for comfort

programme.title: Property Brothers: Marc & Stephanie
programme.desc: Stephanie and Marc are getting frustrated with their house hunt. They’ve been outbid on a series of properties in the city, and the Property Brothers try to sell them on a radically different approach.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sophie & Tim
programme.desc: Newlyweds, busy professionals, and animal lovers, Sophie, Tim, and their two dogs are determined to get out of his cramped condo.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Katie & Michael
programme.desc: Confined to a tiny home in a hot neighbourhood, Katie, Michael, and their three daughters quickly sold their property.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Tom & TJ
programme.desc: Tom and TJ moved to Nashville to pursue a dream job, but they haven’t yet put down roots and are cramped into a friend’s studio apartment until they do.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Maureen & David
programme.desc: Adjusting to life as a single mom, Maureen has decided to sell the sprawling Nashville dream home she bought with her late husband.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kristen & Kacy
programme.desc: Kristin recently packed up her busy life and moved to the city of her dreams, and now the search is on for a cozy and eclectic Nashville pad that’s big enough for a new dog and her best friend from back home, Kacy.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Carson & Leah
programme.desc: A super planner that's been crashing at her best friend's place knows it's time to find a Nashville pad of her own, but the list of add-ons keeps piling up on an ambitious renovation.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Karen & Rick
programme.desc: Empty nesters Karen and Rick sold their house the first day it was on the market, and so they’ve moved into her mom’s home until they can find a deluxe retreat where they can hang with their four grandsons in style.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Jessie & Joe
programme.desc: With twin toddlers, ex-marine Joe and Jessie outgrew their cramped Nashville condo before they moved in. And now the search is on for a farmhouse-style home where they’ll have plenty of room to grow.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Nicole & Matt
programme.desc: While chasing her dream of becoming a musician, Nicole has moved a dizzying 27 times. But now as her career takes flight, she’s finally ready settle down in Nashville.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sandy & Patrick
programme.desc: Leaving everything behind in Wisconsin, Sandy and Pat recently relocated to Nashville for his new dream job.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Unleashed
programme.desc: Soon after Randy recites an incantation from a book on witchcraft, a growling monster appears.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunted Cabinet
programme.desc: After James Hilton and his girlfriend Sandy bring an antique cabinet into their home, they capture actual video evidence proving it’s haunted. Sandy fears the entity from the cabinet is taking James over and turns to paranormal investigators for aid.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghosts Of War
programme.desc: When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting of Summerwind
programme.desc: Ginger moves her family into an old mansion. A supernatural presence torments her husband.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: A nightmare starts when Chris starts renovating his family dream house. A ghost haunts the home. Only with the help of paranormal investigators, priests, psychics, and shamans does Chris figure out a way to protect his family and "evict" the evil spirit.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy
programme.desc: On a visit to an exhibit of ancient Egyptian artifacts, Caleb Weaver experiences a chilling encounter with an unwrapped mummy and unleashes the wrath of a vile beast. Now stronger and more furious than ever, it seeks to possess Caleb.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die
programme.desc: Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In Bridgeport
programme.desc: Connecticut child safety specialist Bob Baker has devoted his life to protecting children from natural and supernatural harm. When his mother starts hearing voices in his childhood home, Bob is faced with a demon that evolves from his own nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Child
programme.desc: Jan’s young son Cody begins communicating with an imaginary friend. She calls on a shaman.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Shadowman
programme.desc: Tim Yancey and his older brother Tom love playing in the woods surrounding their Florida home. One afternoon Tom senses a presence watching him from among the shadows. Days later, the same entity confronts Tim and chases him through the woods.

programme.title: A Haunting: Face Of Evil
programme.desc: Joy, a working mother of three, assumes a girl's weekend at a haunted plantation will be a pleasant change of pace. But after she returns, her youngest child's sleep is shattered by the ominous presence of a dark phantom.

programme.title: A Haunting: Legend Trippers
programme.desc: High school classmates test out an old ghost story on Halloween night.

programme.title: A Haunting: Black Magic
programme.desc: During the renovation of her 150-year-old Pennsylvania home, Debbie Guy accepts the old house has a ghost and they will have to live with it. But when family members are tormented by an evil entity, Debbie seeks the help of paranormal investigators.

programme.title: A Haunting: Phantom Room
programme.desc: Shari and Erol find the perfect California home to raise Shari’s two young daughters. When they discover a mysterious secret room hidden inside their garage, it triggers a ghostly presence. Now, Shari knows she must do something to protect her daughters.

programme.title: A Haunting: Field Of Ghosts
programme.desc: For as long as she can remember, Markie Beason has sensed something horrible happened in her home and becomes frightened to be alone in the house. Her father David, reaches out to a paranormal investigation group in hopes they can bring peace to the home.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The Eggheads team are made up of some of Britain's top quizzers. They face a team of challengers trying to beat the incumbents in order to win a cash prize. If the Eggheads beat the challengers, the cash prize is rolled over to subsequent episodes.

programme.desc: The Eggheads team are made up of some of Britain's top quizzers. They face a team of challengers trying to beat the incumbents in order to win a cash prize. If the Eggheads beat the challengers, the cash prize is rolled over to subsequent episodes.

programme.title: Celebrity Eggheads
programme.desc: Can a team of former sports stars featuring Team GB athletes Katharine Merry and Derek Redmond, England cricketer Ryan Sidebottom and England football goalkeepers Paul Robinson and Peter Shilton win the cash prize for their charity?

programme.title: Celebrity Eggheads
programme.desc: Can a team from world of arts and entertainment featuring actor Simon Greenall, singer Toyah Willcox, arts correspondent Nick Higham, award winning saxophonist YolanDa Brown and Proms presenter Katie Derham win the cash prize for their charity?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A gripping study of the crimes of the Boston strangler. One of the most famous serial killers in history, he admitted to 13 murders, although many still believe his confession was false.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1989, Allan Legere went on a brutal crime spree in Canada, committing assault, rape, arson and murder.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1999, Carole Sund, her 15-year-old daughter Juli and Juli's friend Silvina Pelosso disappeared from Yosemite National Park, California.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Manchester murderer, Trevor Hardy, took the lives of three teenage girls in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Bill Suff's murderous reign of terror spanned 6 years and stole the lives of at least 12 women in California.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Examining the `Highway Hooker', a female serial killer and prostitute sentenced to death by lethal injection for the killing of six men in Florida between 1989 and 1990.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1979, a violent and unpredictable crime spree rocked the town of Richmond, Virginia. Men, women and children were butchered in their homes and on the streets, and the perpetrators were a gang for whom violence ran in the family.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Childhood friends John Duffy and David Mulcahy murder several women in London.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1989, Allan Legere went on a brutal crime spree in Canada, committing assault, rape, arson and murder.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The trial of Timothy Wilson-Spencer, who strangled five people in the 1980s, was historic as it was the first case solved with DNA evidence.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Disturbing killer Edmund Kemper began by murdering his grandparents, before going on to kill and dismember six college girls, his mother and her friend.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A young couple from Canada were serial killers capable of severe cruelty. They targeted young women, including a relative of one of the perpetrators, in a series of crimes that would horrify the nation.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at the murders of Richard Ramirez, who slept in cemeteries as a child and later spread terror in LA by killing, and often raping, over 14 victims.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: After being convicted of attempted murder and kidnapping, David Carpenter went on to kill five women.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Gerald and Charlene Gallego join forces to rape and murder several teenagers.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Known as `the meanest man in America', Donald Henry Gaskins brutally tortured and killed over 100 people. And, even on Death Row, he managed to commit one final murder.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: This edition reviews the case of Levi Bellfield who murdered three women, including Milly Dowler.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The chilling case of Bobby Joe Long, who raped 50 people and murdered nine.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Over a six month period, Colin Ireland lured five gay men to their deaths. As the media whipped up a frenzy of fear proclaiming that a `Gay Slayer' was loose on the streets of London, Ireland continued to taunt the detectives trying to catch him.

programme.title: The Ghost Train
programme.desc: High jinks and chills ensue when a group of people become stranded at an isolated station.

programme.title: Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Simon Sparrow begins medical school in London at St Swithin's Hospital, and moves into an apartment with roommates. A series of challenges and shenanigans takes place during their next five years at medical school.

programme.title: Doctor at Sea
programme.desc: A doctor tires of general practice and signs up to be a ship's doctor in an effort to bring some excitement into his life. Unfortunately, the cargo boat he joins is skippered by a formidable martinet captain and there are only two women on board.

programme.title: Doctor in Love
programme.desc: A doctor falls in love with a nurse while undergoing treatment at his own hospital. When his stand-in breaks his leg and is replaced by a female doctor, he falls for her as well.

programme.title: Raising the Wind
programme.desc: A group of students at an elite music school decide to share a flat in order to cut their living costs and have somewhere to practice together. They get into quite a few scraps and adventures, including impersonating a celebrity quintet.

programme.title: The Fast Lady
programme.desc: A dogmatic Scottish civil servant and enthusiastic cyclist becomes involved with a tycoon and his car-mad daughter.

programme.title: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: Four high profile personalities band together to bump off a tabloid magazine publisher who threatens to expose their dark secrets.

programme.title: The Divorce of Lady X
programme.desc: A barrister is named co-respondent in his client's divorce suit after lending her the overnight use of his hotel suite.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Family drama set in the 1930s about an inexperienced young veterinarian who joins a Yorkshire practice run by an eccentric vet.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: The ill-fated romance of Horatio Lord Nelson and Emma Hamilton, wife of the British Ambassador to Naples. Made during WWII, the film was clearly meant to raise the morale of British audiences and was said to have been Churchill's favourite film.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 1
programme.desc: Allison leaves her job at the D.A.'s office after she's recruited to work for the Lydecker Corporation by another psychic who works there. While enjoying her new job, Allison still regrets leaving the D.A.'s office so suddenly.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 1

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2
programme.desc: While at her new job at the Lydecker Corporation, Allison shares the dreams she's been having of the serial killer in Phoenix with Devalos and Scanlon.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3
programme.desc: Allison struggles with her decision to switch jobs. When she continues to have visions about a serial killer she is forced to choose between honoring the contract with her new job and sharing her information with the police.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3

programme.title: Medium: The Man In The Mirror
programme.desc: After falling into a coma during an investigation, Allison's spirit finds it's way into the body of a man named Todd Emory. Joe and the kids have to adjust to living with Allison's spirit in the body of Todd, who insists on living with them.

programme.title: Medium: The First Bite Is The Deepest
programme.desc: Allison turns to Cynthia Keener (who is now in jail) when she starts dreaming of a former kidnap victim who Cynthia had once rescued.
programme.sub-title: The First Bite Is The Deepest

programme.title: Medium: The Talented Ms. Boddicker
programme.desc: While Allison is coping with Joe's job relocation to San Diego, she dreams about and then subsequently meets a bank teller named Mrs. Boddicker who predicted a robbery at her bank.

programme.title: Medium: Bring Me The Head Of Oswaldo Castillo
programme.desc: When aspects of Allison's dream of losing her entire family start happening in real life, she fears her dream may be coming true.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me The Head Of Oswaldo Castillo

programme.title: Medium: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Allison and her family deal with the outcome of her brain surgery and its possible lasting effects. Also, a local television station owner asks Devalos and Scanlon to look into the possible stalking of his sportscaster.

programme.title: Medium: Who's That Girl
programme.desc: Allison becomes worried after Ariel starts to display strange behavior, and begins to think that a murdered stripper may be possessing her.

programme.title: Medium: Pain Killer
programme.desc: When Allison's friend with cancer suddenly dies she suspects a hospital employee may be at fault. Meanwhile, Bridgette writes a story that closely follows what later happens at Joe's job interview.

programme.title: Medium: The Medium Is The Message
programme.desc: Allison is perplexed when she begins to see visions of strange symbols. When a serial killer strikes Phoenix, she discovers that the symbols could be clues to capturing the killer.

programme.title: Medium: Baby Fever
programme.desc: In the 100th episode, an infant is kidnapped from Allison's neighborhood, and she becomes so determined to find the child that Joe fears she may have become obsessed.

programme.title: Medium: Bite Me
programme.desc: Allison's nightmares put her in scenes from the classic movie Night of the Living Dead, and cause her to awaken with strange bite marks and cuts, as well as clues related to the murder of a funeral director.

programme.title: Medium: New Terrain
programme.desc: Allison rents an SUV after her car gets damaged; she discovers that the SUV's satellite radio lets her hear other people's conversations.

programme.title: Medium: Once In A Lifetime
programme.desc: When Ariel begins dating a boy from school, Allison has visions that indicate he may be involved in a local murder.

programme.title: Medium: The Future's So Bright
programme.desc: After strangely becoming sensitive to light, Allison wears a pair of sunglasses that display strange numbers which may be related to people's life expectancies.

programme.title: Medium: You Give Me Fever
programme.desc: Allison's visions become a vital source of information to the authorities after samples of a deadly disease disappear. Meanwhile, Scanlon thinks he's ready to ask Lynn to marry him.

programme.title: Medium: An Everlasting Love
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a serial killer case dies, and the police are convinced he's the guilty party. When the dead suspect contacts Allison, he tells her that he's innocent and agrees to help her find the real killer.

programme.title: Medium: Dear Dad...
programme.desc: As the anniversary of Devalos' daughter's death come to pass, Devalos is haunted by memories of the traumatic event. Meanwhile, Allison has dreams of the extreme measures Devalos went to put his daughter's killer in jail.

programme.title: Medium: Psych
programme.desc: Allison dreams about a schizophrenic child, but when she meets her in real life, she seems perfectly normal -- but has a mentally ill roommate.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: A 26-tonne bin lorry has fallen onto its side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A dustcart leans dangerously by a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: A horsebox breaks down on the busy M25.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Crouch recovery op Buzz is forced to abandon his wrecker.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin leads an all-night rescue.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when a 40-tonne truck jackknifes.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A 44-tonne truck carrying food catches fire and the cargo keeps reigniting.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A trailer carrying gym weights rolls over a roundabout and needs heavy recovery vehicles.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A lorry breaks down on a busy section of the M25 with a major oil leak and a fire risk.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: A stranded lorry must be removed from a busy street before rush hour begins.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A 44-tonne truck carrying food catches fire and the cargo keeps reigniting.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: A vehicle stuck on the A10 means a recovery amidst busy and dangerous traffic.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: A sinkhole traps a tanker; a car crashes into a ditch; a lorry breaks down.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A coach that has crashed into a hedgerow requires some creative thinking to get rescued.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Stig has the task of trying to rescue a bin lorry that's marooned in mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Two trucks need rescuing when one got stuck trying to pull out the other.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A slide bed loses two wheels and a lorry gets stuck in the mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A 44-tonne artic verges off a country lane and gets tuck in the mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: A lorry rolls over on the edge of a roundabout and a truck with blown suspension.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks
programme.desc: April O'Neil, ace reporter for Channel 6, investigates recent break-ins, allegedly by Ninjas, which have resulted in the thefts of numerous technologies.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Shredder
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder experiments with the Inter-Dimensional Portal, hoping to contact Krang's' Rock Soldiers and prepare an invasion of Earth.
programme.sub-title: Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder & Splintered
programme.desc: Shredder lures Splinter into the Technodrome, this time with the promise that a weapon in his possession can restore the sensei to human form.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Shredder
programme.desc: Shredder trains students at the Dojo for a crooked Turtles gang. The mock turtles' crime spree starts turning the public against Michelangelo, Raphael, Donatello and Leonardo.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Incredible Shrinking Turtles
programme.desc: In the first of a four-parter, the amazing amphibians search for the segments of the powerful crystal Eye of Sarnoth. Shredder cuts the Turtles down to size, literally.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): It Came from Beneath the Sewers
programme.desc: In the second of a four-parter about the pursuit of the Eye of Sarnoth, the Turtles are attacked by a huge alien plant that is making New York into a jungle.
programme.sub-title: It Came from Beneath the Sewers

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mean Machines
programme.desc: The hunt for the Eye of Sarnoth continues in the third of a four-parter with the Turtles in Groucho-like disguises. Shredder hooks up a fragment of the Eye to the computer Omnus.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Curse of the Evil Eye
programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Punk Frogs
programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Neutrino teens Kala, Zak and Eask arrive on Earth and alert the Turtles to Shredder's latest plan to make "mindless zombies" of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Catwoman from Channel 6
programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome
programme.desc: To bring the Technodrome back to Earth, Shredder is instructed to take over the Niagara Falls hydroelectric station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beneath These Streets
programme.desc: While the Turtles, in disguise, are at a movie, Shredder interrupts a press conference to steal a new medi-laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the 50-Foot Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are planning Irma's birthday party, Shredder steals an Exaboron Isotope from a meteorite crash. Krang creates an Exaboron-powered Enlarging Ray which causes six times normal growth, with the intention of using it on Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Maltese Hamster
programme.desc: Shredder gives futuristic laser weapons to mobster Tony Vivaldi and his underlings. Shredder wants to find the Maltese Hamster statue of him, which has inside it the formula for ultimate fuel for the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sky Turtles
programme.desc: Krang creates a Gravity Altering Device which causes everyone in the city, including the Turtles, to start floating.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Old Switcheroo
programme.desc: Two huge electrodes at Cybertech Labs produce a startling effect on two long-time foes. The mind of the Turtles master Splinter winds up in the body of the evil Shredder - and vice versa, causing confusion among their associates.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Burne's Blues
programme.desc: Burne is out to prove to April that he can still dig in the trenches and find good stories after deriding her for failing to come up with anything good lately.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Fifth Turtle
programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King
programme.desc: April does a story on the rat problem the city is facing, and the Rat King kidnaps her. The Rat King is the leader of all the rats under his form of government known as the Ratocracy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): 20,000 Leaks Under the City
programme.desc: Krang is out to liquidate the Turtles by pumping water through the Earth's crust and into the sewer system. The super pump starts sucking up the entire ocean and soon the streets are covered with three feet of water.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles
programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Turtle Snatchers
programme.desc: Donatello and Rocksteady are beamed up to a space ship - by little alien, Nikto, six thousand years old, traveling with his parents Klaatu and Barada.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cutie Pie
programme.desc: Appa worries Umma will be jealous of a flirty online review. Jung returns to his old stomping grounds. Gerald's girlfriend ruffles Janet's feathers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Open Kimunication
programme.desc: Appa and Umma take their bickering to a new level. Janet crosses paths with a photography idol. Shannon's boyfriend asks Jung for a favor.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thy Neighbour's Wifi
programme.desc: Appa has a solution for spotty Wi-Fi: use the neighbor's. Jung has eyes for Shannon's friend. Umma and Pastor Nina ask Janet to do a church reading.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Army Spoon
programme.desc: Gerald photographs Appa and his spoon for an exhibit. Janet's apology for a restaurant faux pas doesn't go well. Umma receives an alarming call.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Kim Cup
programme.desc: An old ping-pong table rekindles a rivalry between Appa and Jung. Umma sets out to bond with Janet but finds Chelsea to be more receptive.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appanoon Delight

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: To Him It May Concern
programme.desc: Following Appa's spelling error, Umma becomes the store sign maker. Kimchee's mom visits and Janet lands an internship for Gerald.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Blabber Talker
programme.desc: Appa and Umma search for an excuse to avoid vacationing with the Lees. Janet scores a lucrative but awkward photography gig.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Kimchee gets conflicting dating advice from Jung and Shannon. Janet's outraged when she learns that Umma's sold off her childhood keepsakes.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appanticitis
programme.desc: Appa gives Umma feedback on an annoying habit and promptly regrets it. Janet bumps into an old flame and Jung considers giving reality TV a shot.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hit 'n' Fun
programme.desc: A small fender bender leads to a big argument between Appa and Umma. Jung second-guesses a birthday greeting. Janet goes from mocker to mocked.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Lord of the Ring
programme.desc: Umma tries to find her missing wedding ring before Appa does. Jung crashes Janet's yoga class.

programme.title: Corporate: The Concert

programme.title: Corporate: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Natural Beauty: Matt starts wearing makeup, and Jake begins work on a project to market makeup to men. Nihilistic, satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E03)

programme.title: Corporate: Thanks!

programme.title: Corporate: Mattchiavelli and the Piss Detective

programme.desc: Labour Day: Matt and Jake get up to mischief while working on Labour Day until they discover they're not the only ones in the office after all. Satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E07)

programme.desc: Chris Hollins and Paul Hayes help a woman raise money for a trip to Canada.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Petit
programme.desc: Banoo Petit hopes to sell mementos to raise funds for replacement windows.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hisom
programme.desc: Christine and Malcolm Hisom from Lancashire want to fund a new pianola.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: MacLeod
programme.desc: A family looks for collectibles to be sold to support wedding festivities.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Norton
programme.desc: Annette Norton wants to fund a world cruise by selling some antiques.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Freeland
programme.desc: Katie Freeland hopes to fund a family safari in Africa.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Humphreys
programme.desc: In Wrexham a mother and daughter who want to raise funds to surprise a family member.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Perry
programme.desc: Two daughters aim to raise funds for a school in memory of her mother.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Mills
programme.desc: Diane Mills's collectibles include signed memorabilia from Sir Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Ingles
programme.desc: Fiona Inglis, mother of Duncan James, wants help to raise money for a special trip.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Mead
programme.desc: Alison Mead wants to raise funds to take her children to New York for a dream holiday.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Dickinson
programme.desc: Angie hopes to become a foster mother and wants to make her house child-friendly.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Sansom
programme.desc: Jill Sansom sets out to raise funds for a clock in the Nottinghamshire village.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents are bombarded with the dangers kids can fall prey: molesters, cyber-stalkers, drugs & bullies. But how far to go to ensure your child's safety? Where do you draw the line between hovering over your children & giving them enough freedom?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes goes inside the unthinkable: making your own child sick to fulfill a disturbing need for attention. The idea might sound unimaginable, but for people with a psychological disorder called Munchausen by Proxy, it's irresistible.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha & Danielle are angry with dad, Ron, who they say abandoned their dying mother, his wife of 30 yrs, to plan a wedding with a Kennedy heiress he met online. His daughters say "Misty Kennedy" is a catfish. Ron says "Misty" is the love of his life.
programme.sub-title: Dad Left Our Dying Mom For A Woman Who's A Kennedy Heir?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Elsa says she was abused daily & beaten with ropes, chains, whips & umbrellas by the people she thought were her adoptive parents, Joe and his wife, Evangeline. Elsa says the abuse lasted for 19 years until an unlikely person stepped up to rescue her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues an incredible story of a woman brutally raped at age 15. Loretta identified the alleged rapist and helped police put him behind bars. But her world was rocked 14 years later when the man, Dean, was exonerated due to DNA evidence. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Could You Be An Eyewitness? Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The tense family drama continues. Dr. Phil sent Private Investigator Harold Copus thousands of miles through three countries including the jungles of Belize to find two sisters, Allene and Mollie, who were abducted by their father one year ago. Part 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom, Vicki, has been married to Marissa's dad, Robert, for 34 years. Marissa discovered her dad was having an "affair" and visiting "porn" and "call girl" websites. Robert, a former pastor, admits a relationship, but insists he's a victim.
programme.sub-title: The Pastor, His Wife, The Call Girl And The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Every parent can tell you that raising a child is often demanding, thankless, hard work. But when a teenager gets pregnant and has a child, the result can be stress and chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the family of Amy, "Mother God", who says she can heal the world with her group, Love Has Won. The family alleges that Amy is a brainwashed "cult leader" and she is putting other people's lives at risk. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Mother God's Followers And Alleged Victims Face Off Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.
programme.sub-title: Hoarding Ultimatum: Your Junk Or Me!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trust has been ranked as the #1 crucial quality for a happy marriage. Deanne & Brian have been married for 12 years with four children between them. Now, due to alleged lies and infidelity, their family is torn apart and divorce is just a signature away.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil follows up with Charles and Tracy. After coming to the conclusion that his dream of being shared by his wife and mistress was never going to happen, did Charles follow through and end his relationship with the other woman? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Brian, Liz, & Bethany. Now former friend Sarah says she lies as her "real" life is "not very exciting." Michelle, who is a cancer survivor and former friend of Sarah's, confronts Sarah for the first time. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Liar, Liar: Sarah Faces Her Accusers Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his mission to end the silence on domestic violence. More than 25 percent of battered women remain in a relationship with their abuser. Sonya fears that she is one of those women who stay. Hear her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1
programme.sub-title: My Husband Thinks I Hacked Our Devices: Clear My Name Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Uncle Kevin Answers The Accusations Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In one of the most twisted & bizarre love deceptions ever on Dr. Phil, 7 female college students from Brigham Young University face the man they say they fell in love with online but never met in person. Don't miss the surprising twist in this story!
programme.sub-title: Exclusive: The Co-Eds And The Catfish

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A recent study shows that the number of men and women having extramarital affairs is on the rise. Could your spouse be cheating on you? Dr. Phil's guests are struggling with the aftermath of infidelity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you know someone whose private persona is dramatically different from the face he or she shows to the world? Dr. Phil's guests say their mates lead a double life, and it's wreaking havoc on their relationships.

programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, Xzibit takes an artist's '95 Probe and turns it into a car that can paint.

programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, Xzibit gives a lift to an Air Force recruit's '68 VW Bug.

programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old cars into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, Xzibit takes a snowboarder's '87 Blazer and gives an old truck some new tricks.

programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old cars into fully loaded cruisin' machines. X and the guys perform magic when they transform a beaten down '88 pulsar into a brand new ride.

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Thunderbird
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Tenita's Ford Thunderbird gets the Xzibit pimpin' treatment.

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Bread Truck
programme.desc: X and the guys at G.A.S. create a skate van from an old bread truck. They even install the loudest sound system you've ever seen!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Benz
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, X and the guys bling out a Mercedes Benz with a 'crunk trunk'!

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: Vegas Van
programme.desc: Xzibit turns tired old cars into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, X and the guys at G.A.S. roll the dice on a Vegas themed van that is down on its luck.

programme.desc: X and the guys create a fantasy car! Complete with reverse gull wing doors, a cotton candy machine, and even a robotic arm!

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: After leaving Geordie Shore; Aaron, Marnie and Holly continue their journey through adult life. No more shots & kebabs, it's all about wedding planning, changing nappies and being grown ups. (S3, ep2)
programme.sub-title: I'm Sexy and I Know It

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: A hospital visit thaws tensions between Aaron and Talia. Holly goes shopping for bridesmaid dresses and Casey hatches a plan behind Marnie's back. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron meets Talia to try and save their relationship. Holly goes on the hunt for her wedding dress and Casey is nearly ready to pop the question... there's just one thing missing. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly debates taking Jacob's name, Aaron and Talia have couples counselling and the time has come for Casey to propose to Marnie. Will he hold his nerve? (S3, ep5)
programme.sub-title: I Think I Wanna Marry You

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie's illness takes a dramatic turn for the worse, Aaron and Talia make a massive step in the right direction and Holly hits the hat shop with her mam. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie and Casey return to the scene of an old argument. Aaron hits the dirt bike track and Holly comes face to face with the past at her hen party. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: The OGs are back but will Aaron and Talia's relationship survive a new baby? Will Marnie and Casey stay strong after a recent split? Will Holly and Jacob ever get married? (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Marnie’s excited when the next arrival turns up, until Aaron gets stuck in and leaves her with a big decision. Marty’s desperate to step it up with Elettra but Chloe has other ideas. (S14, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The house is stunned to discover that Marnie left after Aaron and Chelsea got together. Elettra and Marty boot off over their hot tub frisk and Chloe pushes Marty to breaking point. (S14, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Boss Anna sends the squad to the French Alps. Scotty T’s back and immediately gets stuck into the newbies, and when Anna reveals her latest decision for the new workers Marty isn't happy. (S14, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: It’s proper awks between the newbies, while Scotty T and Abbie begin to get closer. Zahida goes mental at Marty and Gaz gets his revenge on Sam. Marnie's back and gets properly mortal. (S14, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: It's the squad's last days on the piste. Aaron is on the pull with wingman Gaz, it's pure awks between Abbie and Sarah over Scotty T, and things get worse when he tries it on with Zahida. (S14, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Squad head back to the toon and give the newbies their most brutal initiation yet! Zahida and Scotty get closer but will they be able to keep it a secret? Boss Anna has some big news. (S14, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Marty gets mortal and fancies a blast from the past... Sarah. But will Chloe be cool? Zahida tries to clear the air with Sarah and Abbie, but things quickly go west and it all kicks off! (S14, ep11)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: In the season finale, the Geordies throw a huge house party for Nathan. It’s decision time for Boss Anna as she reveals whether it's Abbie, Sarah or Zahida who joins the family for good. (S14, ep12)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The lads and lasses are back and there is an old friend joining the family. It's not long before the gang hit the toon and cracks start to show. Nathan and Chloe fall out over Marty. (S15, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie plans some big life goals. Holly finds her dream home, but will she get a mortgage? Sophie realises her friends are moving on but she isn't. Aaron goes all out for Talia's birthday. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie and Casey view houses but do they want the same things? Holly pursues her PT qualifications while Aaron deals with his choking fears. Sophie embarks on an interesting journey. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Sophie visits Charlotte for advice, Holly visits Charlotte Dawson and gets fired up. Aaron and Talia visit her family. Marnie gets a visit from her wedding planner who brings bad news. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly goes ahead with her "warts an' all" Body Confidence photoshoot! Sophie reveals some truths to a life coach. Marnie and Casey have got wedding venue issues. It's Romeo's 1st Birthday! (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly posts the Body Confidence photos and is noticed by a Kardashian! Aaron's eyeing his first boxing match and Marnie falls in love with a million-pound pad. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Follows Dr Chris Brown and fellow veterinarians, and the stories of the animals they care for at one of Sydney's busiest veterinary clinics, located at Bondi Beach.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Beverley Mahood meets with the LaBarbera family, who are looking for a large breed dog for their four children. They visit with German Shepherds, Siberian Huskies, and German Shorthaired Pointers, but can Dad find the right puppy?

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: It's the turn of the Cook Islands to provide the cases today, as Chris handles a hit-and run victim, a wolfhound with an eye problem and very mischievous goat called Brownie.

programme.title: Vet on the Hill
programme.desc: Scott's oldest patient, 21-year-old Rudi the cat, needs a huge mass removed from her ear. Meanwhile, Buppy, the 13-year-old Chihuahua suffers from diabetes and Scott is concerned about the condition of his liver.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Incredible stories of wildlife rescue and rehabilitation.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Will has to move Harry, a five-tonne troublesome bull elephant, to a new home. Debbie has her hands full with orphaned baboons Holly and Ivy. Alison prepares to release three critically endangered African penguins back into the ocean.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The highs and lows of the vets and volunteers who have given up their day jobs in the UK and made the decision to move to South Africa to rescue, rehabilitate and release some of the world's most iconic species of animals.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The highs and lows of the vets and volunteers who have given up their day jobs in the UK and made the decision to move to South Africa to rescue, rehabilitate and release some of the world's most iconic species of animals.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The highs and lows of the vets and volunteers who have given up their day jobs in the UK and made the decision to move to South Africa to rescue, rehabilitate and release some of the world's most iconic species of animals.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: On the Eastern Cape, vet Emily is called to help four young sable antelope who are being bullied by an older dominant male. And at Umoya Khulula Wildlife Centre, Emma is busy rehabilitating Cornelius the rescued caracal.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Hope gets hurt; an owl gets a nasty welcome back to the wild.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Traveling to San Diego, Hope and Allison look to learn how to handle huge caseloads and dangerous animals.

programme.title: UnStable
programme.desc: Megan returns to Wendigo and asks for her job back. Tammy's hot young date shows up at the barn unexpectedly. Allie calls up Mike to tell him if he wants Tammy back.

programme.title: UnStable
programme.desc: Megan angers Allie by teaching a lesson without permission and Tammy has surprising news.

programme.title: UnStable
programme.desc: Tammy's fiancé goes golfing and leaves her to arrange everything for their last-minute wedding. Megan and Jamie stay in Wendigo to deliver the horse they just sold.

programme.title: UnStable
programme.desc: Alex misbehaves during a riding lesson and Tammy, Allie search for a new barn.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Hamish looks at Nibbler, a biting tame ferret. Dr. James controls Zeus, an Aspidites melanocephalus. Dr. Michelle treats a talkative noble parrot with suspected reproductive problems.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris is reunited with an old friend, Pluto the singing Dalmatian. Plus, cocker spaniel Dusty needs radical ear surgery.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Terrier Benji is suffering from a large heart murmur that without immediate surgery could be fatal at any moment. Chris entrusts this operation to Dr Andrew Marchevsky.

programme.title: I Love You 2
programme.desc: After having confessed to Louise, Jérémie and Anna the double life he's been living for the past year, they never want to see Hector again and he falls into depression. A few weeks later, Jérémie feels lonely and finds unexpected support from Louise.

programme.title: OUTshorts
programme.desc: A selection of Queer short films, featuring entertaining stories and inspiring documentaries.

programme.title: Boystown
programme.desc: Chris tries to steal back the original copy of his audition master tape. Plus, Rick finally realises that he needs to be in therapy after he tries to kill T.J.

programme.title: Back to Corsica
programme.desc: It wouldn't be a summer in Corsica without a village ball, when everyone gets together for a party. They have fun, they dance, flirt and drink - perhaps too much.

programme.title: Boystown
programme.desc: Chance returns to Los Angeles, but only to stir things up. Plus, Rick's jealousy continues to cause huge problems for his new relationship.

programme.title: The General
programme.desc: Maria Luisa fights for the rights and privileges which, in her time, are reserved almost exclusively for men, even taking on a false male identity.

programme.title: Call Me Marianna
programme.desc: Marianna prepares for gender reassignment surgery.

programme.title: L Bomb
programme.desc: A woman brings her girlfriend home for Thanksgiving as she tries to come out to her parents. But an unexpected guest arrives and thwarts her plans.

programme.title: Elton John: A Life in Song
programme.desc: Elton John's career has spanned decades, but his legacy is more than just his music. Reginald Dwight's early debut was in the band Bluesology, where he would meet lyricist Bernie Taupin with whom he would go on to write over 30 albums.

programme.title: On My Way Out
programme.desc: To the outside world, Holocaust survivors Roman and Ruth have always had the perfect marriage. But at age 95, Roman reveals a shocking secret to his family: he's gay, and wants to live his life in complete freedom.

programme.title: Dropping the Soap
programme.desc: Olivia encourages (forces) the cast to attend her latest creation, Drama-Con, the Comic-Con for soap fans.

programme.title: F***ing Adelaide
programme.desc: Eli returns to Adelaide after facing disaster in Sydney. All he wants to do is sleep in his old bed, but sister Emma is also there, young Kitty presents him with questionable clothes, and mum has shocking news about the family home.

programme.title: My Life Is a Telenovela
programme.desc: A celebratory brunch for Raquenel's big new role breaks into chaos, and Sissi ambushes Raquenel on set. Raquenel opens a box full of dark secrets.

programme.title: Mixed Messages
programme.desc: Ren is on the hunt for romance, but in a world of tinder and zero commitment, getting lucky has never been harder.

programme.title: The Pam Ann Show
programme.desc: Flying to London with guests, singer David Campbell, Julia Morris and the Queen.

programme.title: My Life Is a Telenovela
programme.desc: An ambush on the red carpet forces Raquenel to strike back. Meanwhile, Sissi seduces Gustavo, while Enrique brings Raquenel to see a psychic.
