programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tom Arnold
programme.desc: Tom Arnold heads into the unpredictable coastal mountains of Oregon. They take a helicopter to an isolated forest, hike through woodland, catch a trout and cross a river with the help of a log.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Tamron Hall's tenacious personality shines through as Bear pushes her to her limits.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ed Helms
programme.desc: Actor Ed Helms faces sheer cliffs, crumbling rock and a cringeworthy dinner menu while atop Colorado mountains; Helms discusses the road to his career in comedy.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julianne Hough
programme.desc: Bear and actress Julianne Hough navigate the unforgiving terrain and wild animals of the African savanna; Julianne talks about her adolescence and her determination to succeed.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Winslett
programme.desc: Acclaimed movie star Kate Winslet takes a role like never before, as Bear paramotors them both to the top of the Snowdonia Mountains in Wales.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, President Barack Obama
programme.desc: President Barack Obama and Bear Grylls explore the Alaskan wilderness, where they observe evidence of climate change, sample wild salmon and catkins tea made with water from melting glaciers; Obama discusses his official duties, parenthood and faith.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Uzo Aduba
programme.desc: Uzo Aduba joins Bear on a harrowing journey to Spain's Pyrenees Mountains, where they face a poisonous viper and secure a dinner of field mice; Uzo shares the story of her path to fame and her family's emigration from Nigeria.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Michelle Rodriguez
programme.desc: Actress Michelle Rodriguez and Bear go to a desert Nevada; unexpected high winds during a sky-diving trip send Michelle off course; Michelle and Bear must come up with clever ways to stay hydrated.
programme.sub-title: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Bear and Joseph Gordon-Levitt navigate Kenya's unyielding terrain; Joseph and Bear navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for hydration, ascend a massive rock dome and battle a crocodile for dinner; Joseph talks about his family and rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Scott Eastwood
programme.desc: Actor Scott Eastwood joins Bear on a journey through the harsh Bulgarian outback; the duo rappel from a towering arch, cross a raging river, descend into a dark cave and face off against a snake; Scott details growing up with his famous father.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, James Marsden
programme.desc: X-man' James Marsden joins Bear on an adventure into the heart Rattle Snake Canyon in Utah, where they helicopter on to one of the highest arches in the area.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Drew Brees
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures deep into Panama's Camino de Cruces jungle with Super Bowl winning quarterback Drew Brees, exploring caves and wrestling a six-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Marshawn Lynch
programme.desc: Bear and Super Bowl champion Marshawn Lynch tackle a rugged mountain range that has sharp cliffs and dark chasms; the pair comes face to face with the French Foreign Legion and pursues a wild hog for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.
programme.sub-title: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Zac Efron

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lena Headey
programme.desc: Lena Headey and Bear journey through Spain's Iberian Peninsula; they rappel from a towering ridge, dine on bone marrow from a goat carcass and cross a lake using a makeshift raft during an unexpected storm; Lena details her life and rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland.
programme.sub-title: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Courtney Cox

programme.title: JAG: Against All Enemies
programme.desc: Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: JAG: Impact
programme.desc: Harm and Bud investigate the crash of a Marine helicopter whose dead pilot is being blamed for the incident. They discover the chopper seems to have been hit by some form of UFO. Government security officials want to maintain a cover-up at all costs.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG: Defensless
programme.desc: A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG: Act of Terror
programme.desc: When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG: The Black Jet
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG: Silent Service
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Greenie Board
programme.desc: Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: JAG: True Calling
programme.desc: When a petty officer smuggles a pregnant Serbian woman aboard the carrier in order to save her from a vengeful fiancée, he's arrested and scheduled to be court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Psychic Warrior
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Rouge
programme.desc: As the lowest ranking lawyer at JAG, Bud is assigned to accompany Raglan, a former Special Forces operative who is hired by the Pentagon to test security at military bases.

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Window of Opportunity
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an armed suspect, the cops are called when a man damages his neighbor's window, and deputies investigate a parking garage known for illegal activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS: Two Too Many
programme.desc: A man fights with his wife over a haircut, then leads police on a car chase. A woman gets violent with her boyfriend and then calls the police on him.

programme.title: COPS: The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car.

programme.title: COPS: Borderlands
programme.desc: Officers attempt to detain undocumented border crossers. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.

programme.title: COPS: Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a man about to confront his wife for her accusations about his sexuality, search a baton-wielding cyclist, and check the prints of a man with no identification.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sluggish suspect attempts to outrun the police, officers try to piece together a wild fight between neighbors, and a man's plot to extort money from an ex goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Bible Buddies
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS: Dangerous Toppings
programme.desc: A jaywalker with no id bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS: Backseat Denial
programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won't cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop leads to a foot chase, a driver found with meth narcs on his passenger who has warrants, and a 17-year-old is caught driving without a permit.

programme.title: COPS: Now It's Lawn Furniture
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit's help.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in hiding is sniffed out quickly by the K-9 unit, a couple gets caught lying when an officer recognizes them, and a woman's dogs save her a trip to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers tackle a man carrying other people's credit cards, two women deny ownership of drug paraphernalia found in their bags, and police mediate a father-son dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police collect DNA to establish ownership of a sketchy cigarette pack, investigate an assault between elderly roommates, and question a man claiming to be framed by his ex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers suspect meth use by a man sleeping in a bus station, a pedestrian's multiple bags of drugs suggest trafficking, and a drunk driver claims she was set up.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Rumor Whisperer
programme.desc: Amanda is nominated for a magazine's Businesswoman of the Year award. Megan learns the truth when she eavesdrops on a conversation between Lexi and Drew.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Night The Lights Went Out At Melrose
programme.desc: Lexi decides not to fire Megan for her betrayal. Peter realizes that he has been cold to Eve.
programme.sub-title: The Night The Lights Went Out At Melrose

programme.title: Melrose Place: Suspicion
programme.desc: Kyle becomes suspicious of Eve after she angrily rejects a record deal. Peter catches Eve in a lie about her whereabouts.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Fiddling On The Roof
programme.desc: Overcome with guilt after kissing Alex, Jane hides out at a hotel. Amanda goes to the church to tell a heartbroken Michael that the wedding is off.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Lethal Wedding 4
programme.desc: Ryan insults Megan and gets into a fist fight with Michael. Jane sues Michael for divorce, and he responds with a countersuit.

programme.title: Melrose Place: When Cheerleaders Attack
programme.desc: Amanda and Eve reveal their secret to Kyle. Peter and Eve are married and find a naked Lexi waiting in their room.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Suddenly Sperm
programme.desc: Michael must sell the beach house to pay off his debts. Jane and Michael reminisce about their first date.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Usual Santas
programme.desc: Lexi, Amanda, and Eve are caught in a bank hold-up involving men in Santa Claus suits. Amanda begins to worry about Kyle's drinking.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Kyle High Club
programme.desc: Kyle continues to abuse alcohol and prescription pills. When Amanda and Ryan come to Kyle's rescue, she sees women coming out of his room and assumes that he is cheating on her.

programme.title: Melrose Place: I Married A Jock Murderer
programme.desc: Eve and Ryan try to reunite Kyle and Amanda. Ryan becomes suspicious of Megan's irregular hours.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Fist Full Of Secrets
programme.desc: Peter travels to Oakhurst to investigate Eve's past. Ryan intercepts a drug delivery for Kyle and pushes his brother into flushing the pills.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Younger Son Also Rises
programme.desc: Kyle and Ryan's overbearing father, Mack, surprises his sons with a visit. Ryan and Kyle flee Kyle's birthday party and get into a fight.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Saving Ryan's Privates

programme.title: Melrose Place: They Shoot Blanks, Don't They?
programme.desc: Eve is jealous of the amount of time Peter is spending with Amanda. Kyle breaks out of rehab and goes ballistic.

programme.title: Melrose Place: How Amanda Got Her Groove Back

programme.sub-title: How Amanda Got Her Groove Back

programme.desc: Kyle and Amanda are anxious to speed up the construction on their house but learn that it will cost them. Jackie is assaulted by her boss.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Real World

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Big Sleep

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dream A Little Dreama Me
programme.desc: Her Witches License and a new student bring Sabrina a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Salem And Juliette
programme.desc: Sabrina helps Salem find a date for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Jealousy

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Prelude To A Kiss

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: It’s Halloween, and Sabrina is having a ghoulish time adjusting to her new job at the coffee house.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Little Orphan Hilda
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda experience a life-changing event when they discover they are adopted.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Spoiled Rotten

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Aging Not So Gracefully

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Ice Station Sabrina
programme.desc: A life-threatening situation forces Sabrina to risk exposing her magic to a witch hunter.

programme.desc: When the weather outside turns frightful, the Spellman’s plan a trip to Jamaica.

programme.desc: As maid of honor, Sabrina pays the price for reuniting Salem with his daughter in time for her wedding.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Love In Bloom
programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse
programme.desc: Brad’s witch hunting gene goes into overdrive when Sabrina comes down with Spring Fever.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Pilot
programme.desc: Sabrina’s Sweet 16 becomes a truly magical birthday when she discovers she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Bundt Friday
programme.desc: Under the influence of truth sprinkles, Sabrina learns honesty is the best policy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The True Adventures Of Rudy Kazootie

programme.sub-title: The True Adventures Of Rudy Kazootie

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans on the world's most challenging obstacle course; the new Piston Plunge obstacle makes its debut on the course which ends with the Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans on the world's most challenging obstacle course; the new Kickboards obstacle makes its debut on the course which ends with the Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals begin in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including, for the first time, Kaleidoscope, Ghost Town and Spin Zone; the two fastest ninjas will face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals continue in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including new obstacles Hopscotch and Box Office. The two fastest ninjas face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals continue in Los Angeles where competing ninjas will face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including new obstacles Over Under and Flipped Around; the two fastest ninjas will face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals conclude in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles. The two fastest ninjas face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass going into the National Finals.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The finals return to Las Vegas where the ninjas face up to eight super-sized obstacles in Stage 1. The ninjas must complete the course, including new obstacles Three Ring Circus and Tetherball, to advance to Stage 2 of the national finals.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The finals continue in Las Vegas where the ninjas face super-sized obstacles in Stages 1 and 2 in timed runs; the ninjas who advance to Stage 2 must complete a six-obstacle course, including new obstacle Hornet's Nest, to advance to Stage 3.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The national finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining competitors move on to stages 3 and 4 for their chance to win $1 million and become the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury
programme.desc: The Rangers question Void Knight's intentions; Santaura comes up with a new strategy to hunt down her former partner in crime.

programme.desc: The adventures of a colourful group of friends on the magical island of Tulipop.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The adventures of a colourful group of friends on the magical island of Tulipop.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Upon discovering a mysterious egg, Maddy and her friends decide to take it under their care. Later, they learn that it is a dragon egg and its father is searching for it.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy's friends arrive with some mysterious fragments they have recently discovered. Meanwhile, she is occupied in the kitchen, attempting to follow a recipe. Unfortunately, something goes awry with her culinary efforts.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy and Fred stumble upon a peculiar well that appears to grant wishes. With Mr Tree's guidance, they discover that the well conceals a network of tunnels, allowing underground access to all the most significant locations in Tulipop.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends' picnic on Turtle Islands disappears mysteriously. They return to Tulipop with empty tummies and an unexpected stowaway!

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maddy plans to bake a cake for her friends and decorate the table with flowers. She ventures out to pick some blooms, but upon returning home, peculiar events begin to unfold in the kitchen.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The group of friends sets out in search of the best pumpkins, some for baking a cake and others for decoration. Although they intend to stay together, Gloomy inadvertently wanders off and becomes lost.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred encounters some small creatures who have lost their homes and asks his friends to help find them a new one. Through her research in a book, Bubble discovers that the creatures' original home is made of gold thread.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends are gathering berries to bake a delicious cake when, deep in the forest, they encounter a little yodelot who has lost his way home.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Grumpkin prepares a Troll Feast, but his friends can't eat troll food as it is full of weird troll ingredients. How do they tell him without hurting his feelings?

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maddy surprises her friends with an unusual task of looking after a little dragon they know. What appears to be a simple job of putting the dragon to sleep turns out to be far more challenging than any of them had anticipated.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy has concocted a magical potion that creates enormous soap bubbles. She and her friends succeed in getting inside one. However, Bubble loses control and finds herself unable to stop or escape.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: After the rain, Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy are keen to see the rainbow, but they notice the yellow colour is missing. They decide to investigate the origin of rainbows and discover that in Tulipop, Jellies are responsible for creating them.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends decide to spend the night with Mr Tree under the stars. Fred, however, is terribly afraid of the dark. Despite his inability to sleep, he manages to overcome his fear with the help of his friends.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is reluctant to go outside and play due to the rain, prompting Gloomy to seek a solution. Despite his best intentions, Gloomy inadvertently creates a mixture of sun, rain and snow.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Bubble soar through the sky, astride two butterflies, whilst poor Gloomy is forced to remain on the ground. However, determined to join his friends, Gloomy uses his potion to enlarge a firefly to gigantic proportions.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy's magic makes butterflies enormous, leading to an unexpected ride. Fred and Bubble fly away on giant butterflies, while Gloomy must make do with a slow-moving, lumbering glowbug.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maya the Mermaid's musical practice causes problems with her friend Octavius the Octopus. The two get into a disagreement, and Fred and Gloomy must help mend a friendship.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends hear music from the Forgotten Forest and feel glum. They discover its source and realise that they must cheer up the Weeping Willow to stop its sad music from affecting everyone.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: In the forest, a melody so sorrowful resonates, casting melancholy over all who hear it. The source is Willow, a weeping willow abandoned by his group. Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy offer to play and sing alongside him, lifting his spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends clean up their houses for the Midwinter Munchkin on Midwinter's Eve. While the others get ready, Gloomy's messy house may cause the Midwinter Munchkin to skip his visit.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tulipop and the friends decide to visit Grumpkin. Poor Grumpkin cannot come outside to play. Gloomy and his friends decide to help him spend a day in the sun and thanks to a magic potion they will solve the situation.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is in the swamp and makes friends with a mud monster. Gloomy, Bubble and Maddy are a little scared of this little creature but soon they realise that he is funny and friendly.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Gloomy decide to go to an unexplored territory of Tulipop. Despite their fear of the dark, they encourage each other and discover a beautiful lagoon populated by small lava spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred, Maddy, Bubble and Gloomy go on a picnic in the forest to watch the leaves of the trees change colour. But suddenly the leaves turn blue. This is because the forest elf has lost his colour crystal.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: As winter has begun, the little friends decide to go ice skating. Maddy is not doing very well, but her friends are ready to help her so they can all play together.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tiger Moon falls into the sea, and the whole island must come together to help it find its way home.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Hämy and Jere search for treasure on a new island, but the island is not what it seems.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: When the foal shows a flash of her future magical markings, Ava asks Cinder to "mentor" her before she's released back into the wild.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: While riding the Skyberry Trail, Wildstar gets spooked by grim magic, sending the group racing to a long-forgotten temple full of mysteries and danger.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: Miss Primrose accelerates the students' training by sending them to an advanced obstacle course. But will competition get in the way?

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: To learn more about grim magic, Sophia, Ava and Layla sneak into the library after hours to borrow a restricted book that proves to be too powerful.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: When grim magic contaminates the academy's water supply, the unicorns risk losing their power unless Sophia can save Starglow Lake with an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: Eager to decode the message from the Whispering Willows, Sophia skips party planning to visit the Vision Pool - right after promising Ava she wouldn't.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: The Sapphires try everything to get Sophia and Ava to stop fighting, but they've got bigger problems: Two dastardly henchmen are after the grimstone.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: As the academy teachers gear up to battle a powerful foe, they forbid their students from leaving the dorms. But one rider doesn't follow the rules.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: Without the help of their teachers, the students must work together to take on the evil Ravenzella all by themselves. Unicorn Academy depends on it!

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: When a Foal Star is being hassled by Fluffhoppers, Ava and Sophia have to sneak the star into the Academy to keep it safe.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: Excited to take care of their new baby unicorn friend, Ava shows off a very specific parenting style, but Isabel has her own ideas.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Tears On a Red Sweater
programme.desc: Upon realizing that Harlock knew who Shizuka's real identity is, she deems that she has failed in her mission.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Farewell! Mayu
programme.desc: The invasion Mazone forces finally begin their attack on Earth.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Heroic! The Commander Dies
programme.desc: The Arcadia leaves for space with Kiruta on board, after he was injured while trying to save Mayu.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Then, The Angels Sang
programme.desc: After a bunch of skirmishes, the true battle finally begins.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Duel! The Queen VS. Harlock
programme.desc: Making its way past countless gunshots, the Arcadia finally arrives at Queen Lafresia's flagship.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Farewell, Space Outlaw
programme.desc: Harlock and his crew go for their triumphant return to Earth, but, all that awaits them is an order that they've been banished from Earth.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Departure Ballad
programme.desc: On the road to Megalopolis, Tetsuro is encountered by Count Mecha and watches as his mother is killed.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Red Winds of Mars
programme.desc: The capital of Mars, Great Syrtis. It is a deserted planet with nothing but the blowing of the red winds.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Titan's Sleeping Warrior
programme.desc: Tetsuro is rescued from a ghost by Claire, a waitress they met. But in doing so, Claire is blasted into a million pieces.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Great Bandit Antares
programme.desc: The great bandit Antares hijacks the 999 and takes Tetsuro and the gang hostage as he forces them to make an unplanned stop at his home.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Shadow of the Planet of Indecision
programme.desc: Pluto, the resting place for the bodies of those who have replaced their human bodies with mechanical ones.
programme.sub-title: Shadow of the Planet of Indecision

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Comet Library
programme.desc: Tetsuro arrives at the nest of Comets, Comet Station, and is shocked at its lack of vertical scope.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Graveyard at the Bottom of Gravity - Part One
programme.desc: The 999 spirals downward to the bottom of gravity. They enter into the 333, which had previously crashed in there, only to find that hundreds of years appear to have passed by!
programme.sub-title: The Graveyard at the Bottom of Gravity - Part One

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Graveyard at the Bottom of Gravity  Part Two
programme.desc: Continuing the plot, we find out that Ryuz is a depressed woman who was betrayed by the man she loved while she was transforming her body for him.
programme.sub-title: The Graveyard at the Bottom of Gravity  Part Two

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Trader Junction  Part One
programme.desc: Trader Junction, a crossroads for the Galaxy Railways. Surrounding the station are countless desolate travelers with nothing more to do but wait.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Trader Junction  Part Two
programme.desc: Tetsuro foolishly falls asleep and is taken by Hanako aboard the train bound for Wildflower Station. He is introduced to Hanako's elderly parents as her fiancé.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Formless Planet Nuruba
programme.desc: On the planet without a form, Nuruba, Tetsuro and Maetel are ambushed by its citizens for their bodies and their clothes are stolen.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Fossilized Warrior  Part One
programme.desc: The 999 has to make an emergency stop at Fossilized Planet, a place petrified all the way to the tracks. Tetsuro is curious about the fossils and leaves the 999.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Fossilized Warrior  Part Two
programme.desc: Tetsuro rescues the fossilized warrior from a gang of thieves. However, the warrior runs off with Tetsuro's pass. He attempts to leave on the 999 along with the fossil of his lover, Lidya.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Laala from the Double Planet
programme.desc: Perfect Mechanization, a planet where all its inhabitants have taken on mechanical bodies. All its people look down upon flesh-and-blood humans.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Water Kingdom - Beethoven
programme.desc: On the Black Knight's Planet, Tetsuro is invited to live together with the Black Knight. When Tetsuro refuses, he frantically throws his lance at him! Maetel jumps to the rescue but he's his by the lance!

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Town of Fireflies
programme.desc: On the planet where people have the ability to glow, Tetsuro meets a struggling aspiring animation director named Fraiya. Tetsuro feels lousy after she rejects his offer to give her money.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Armored Planet
programme.desc: On a planet where all living things are covered in hard armor, Maetel is hit by an armored bug and is seriously injured.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Maetel of Mud
programme.desc: In the Mud Capitol, a city where the rain never stops, Tetsuro receives a phone call from a woman and is dragged out into the mud.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Kingdom of Atonement
programme.desc: In The Kingdom of Atonement, a town famous for its sanitation, the conductor is attacked by a mugger on his day off! Tetsuro and Maetel console him.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Souls of Professionals
programme.desc: On Professional, the planet of memories, Tetsuro ignores Maetel's advice, and makes eye contact with a professional hangman.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Tombstone of Dead Leave
programme.desc: The inside of Ballera has become hollow. Tetsuro and Maetel are swimming around in the air when they're attacked by some cowboys and it causes a big commotion.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Pirate Ship Queen Emeraldas
programme.desc: The 999 is raided by the pirate ship Queen Emeraldas. They try to put up a fight, but realize quickly that it is all in vain, and are forced to stop on the Pirate Planet.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Queen of the Primitive Planet
programme.desc: This world has been split up, due to a feud, into civilization and primeval society.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Planet of Dimensional Voyage
programme.desc: The Planet of Dimension Voyage travels across the galaxy at the whim of its egotistical queen, Egoterina.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: A Steel Angel
programme.desc: Masspron, a world covered in factories. The hotel Tetsuro is staying in is burnt to the ground.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Skeletons Song
programme.desc: Horohoro egg vendor who loses a piece of his body each time he is betrayed by his lover. He's to the point where his chest is completely hollow with the exception of a few bones.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Goddess of Children and Easy Birth in the Snow Capital
programme.desc: On this planet where snow never ceases to fall, Maetel and a straggling Tetsuro encounter a starving girl named Yuki.
programme.sub-title: The Goddess of Children and Easy Birth in the Snow Capital

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Great Writer of the Mirage Planet
programme.desc: Tetsuro and the gang touch down on the supposedly uninhabited Mirage Planet. There, they encounter the great novelist, Shosetsu Yoi.
programme.sub-title: The Great Writer of the Mirage Planet

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Turbo is in a difficult situation; Mark is forced to face the toughest job of his career.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
