programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Simon Whitlock joins Paul Nicholson on Tungsten Talk to delve into memorable moments on the darts circuit.

programme.title: Catfish UK: Angelica & Jeroen
programme.desc: Angelica's been speaking to Jeroen online for three and a half years. After several failed attempts to meet, she's now desperate to find out if Jeroen is real? (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Levi & Will
programme.desc: Levi is convinced Will is his dream man and broke up with his boyfriend so they could be together. After always cancelling on Levi, Oobah and Nella suspect something fishy is going on. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Jordan & Austin
programme.desc: After two years of chatting, Jordan believes Austin is the one. But every time they arrange to meet, Austin cancels. Can Julie and Oobah finally bring them together? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Leanne & Jamie
programme.desc: Leanne is desperate to find out if online love Jamie is her Mr Right. After cancelling on her numerous times, Leanne wants Oobah and Nella to investigate and finally bring them face to face. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Cole, Abbie & The Fanpage
programme.desc: Cole and Abbie keep being sent anonymous creepy gifts to their home and their relationship is now at breaking point. Julie and Oobah head to Scotland to try and help save their marriage. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Emma & Harlin
programme.desc: Julie and Oobah uncover more than they were expecting, as their search to help Emma find her online love Harlin takes a sinister turn. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Alex & Matt
programme.desc: Alex has been chatting to Matt for a year and thinks he could be the one. But after several failed attempts to meet, Alex wants Julie and Oobah to track him down. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Be My Valentine
programme.desc: Amber, Chloe and Mia have very different Valentine's Day experiences, Megan has her baby shower and Sassi and Darren reach breaking point. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: It's never a quiet life for our teen mums. Sassi plasters over the cracks, Megan prepares for her big day, Amber's love life is in tatters, Chloe buys a house and the all-new Mia is here! (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Labour And Love
programme.desc: More tears, tiffs and true love in Teen Mom UK. Megan has a baby, Amber has a meltdown, and romance is in the air for Mia. Sassi celebrates her 1st Mother's Day and Chloe tackles her weight. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Lads Trip
programme.desc: Megan welcomes a new addition to the family... a horse! Chloe heads to the gym while Jordan heads to Amsterdam. There are fireworks for Amber and Ste, and Sassi plans a Christening. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Making Memories
programme.desc: Sassi almost misses her own Christening, Amber helps Ste celebrate his big day, Chloe remembers what it's like being a teenager, Megan makes a decision and Mia is left feeling frustrated. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Now Or Never
programme.desc: In the season finale it's make or break for Megan and Dylan and you'll never guess who's going on a date! As Sassi boards a plane, Mia jumps out of one. Chloe treats herself, big time. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Make Or Break
programme.desc: Welcome to the world Teen Mom UK series 3. Join our favourite five feisty Brit teen mums for access all areas into their worlds of toddlers, tiffs, tapas and tough love! (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: The Ex Factor
programme.desc: Fireworks tonight as Amber decides she loves Ste, Erin stays the night at Manley's, Sassi hates single life, Megan tries to fix her family feud and Chloe and Jordan argue about nursery. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: It's all kicking off as Chloe loses it with Jordan, Sassi breaks down over Darren, Amber's confession backfires, Megan's in a bad place and Mia has something to say to Manley's mum. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Tasheeka & Aaron
programme.desc: After avoiding video calls for 2 years, Tasheeka is desperate to find out if Aaron is her Prince Charming. It's up to Julie and Oobah to see if this online romance has a fairy tale ending. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Alayah & Tommy
programme.desc: Alayah and Tommy started messaging on a live streaming platform. Alayah thinks he could be the one, but when they try and meet, he keeps cancelling. Nella and Oobah help to track him down. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Taylor & Brad
programme.desc: Taylor is falling in love with Brad despite never having seen his face. Can Oobah and Nella find the man of her dreams, and will Taylor get her happy ever after? (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Hayley & Alex
programme.desc: Oobah is joined by Catfish US royalty Kamie to help Hayley finally meet Alex. But after five months of avoiding phone calls and cancelling on her, will she get her a fairy tale ending? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Justice For Sheila?
programme.desc: This report offers fresh insight into the brutal murder of Sheila Bellush, a Sarasota, Florida mother of quadruplets who was killed in front of her children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Power and Passion
programme.desc: 48 Hours probes case of Alabama politician Stephen Nodine -- accused in the 2010 shooting death of his mistress, Angel Downs.

programme.title: 48 Hours: While Innocents Slept
programme.desc: A report based on the murder case involving the deaths of two infants which were originally attributed to SIDS (Sudden Infant Death Syndrome).

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live To Tell: River's Edge
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Two men convicted for a brutal rape they say they didn’t commit, and DNA evidence backs them up. How did a law professor, her students and new DNA technology play a part in the case?

programme.title: 48 Hours: Pain and Gain
programme.desc: A report about the crimes of the Sun Gym gang, a group of Miami, Florida drifters, petty thieves, and bodybuilders who kidnapped and killed wealthy people to fuel their lifestyle.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death Wish
programme.desc: A report surrounding the July 2009 death of Jeffrey Locker, whose body was found slumped over the steering wheel of his car in Harlem, New York. When authorities tracked Locker’s ATM card to Kenneth Minor, Minor said Locker had begged Minor to kill him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed the Prosecutor?
programme.desc: Steve Tauzer, a prominent assistant district attorney in Kern County, CA, was found murdered in his garage. Chris Hillis, a former police officer, a colleague and friend of Tauzer, was arrested for the murder. Chris’ son Lance was key to the case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Stranger You Know
programme.desc: A report about Marti Hill, who was savagely beaten in her Prairie Village, Kansas home. She was found by police barely breathing and covered in blood.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Father and Son
programme.desc: A teenager makes a discovery that could prove his mother's death was not suicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Strange Truth
programme.desc: In March 2003, Ramona Krotine left an office party and was never seen alive again. 24 hours later, she was found in the trunk of her car, beaten and shot to death. At first, police suspected a botched robbery but later believed her husband was to blame.

programme.title: 48 Hours: OJ Simpson: Endgame
programme.desc: The OJ Simpson trial for the murder of Nicole Brown Simpson and Ron Goldman, the controversy that surrounded it, the impact it had on race relations, including the current and recent uproar over race, patriotism, and free speech in America.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Psychiatrist and the Selfie
programme.desc: The case against Jacob Nolan, who claims his cousin and psychiatrist, Dr. Pamela Buchbinder, brainwashed him into attempting to kill her former lover, fellow psychiatrist Dr. Michael Weiss.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In 1986, 21-year-old Mitzi Nalley was brutally murdered in her Austin, Texas home. Police arrested Jonathan Wayne Nobles, who confessed to the crime and was sentenced to the death penalty.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Spokane
programme.desc: A report that focuses on the murders in Spokane, Washington over a period of a little more than two years (1997 - 1999) of at least a dozen women, mostly prostitutes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: In 1976, Deborah Gardner, a Peace Corps worker, was murdered while on assignment in the South Pacific island nation of Tonga. Dennis Priven, a 24-year-old fellow Peace Corps worker, who appeared to be obsessed with Gardner, was charged by Tongan police.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunt for Mr. Wright
programme.desc: A report on George Wright, who was sentenced to prison for the 1962 murder of New Jersey service station owner Walter Patterson, and who after spending 8 years in prison, escaped, and spent 40 years on the run from the authorities.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dirty Little Secrets
programme.desc: In April 2006, Matt Baker, a pastor from Waco, Texas, returned home to find his wife Kari unconscious, with an empty bottle of Unisom and a suicide note beside her. Police ruled it a suicide. However, her family believed otherwise.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Heroes Under Fire
programme.desc: A fire that ignited in an abandoned warehouse in Worcester, Massachusetts in 1999, claimed the lives of six firefighters. A homeless couple living in the building, were subsequently charged with manslaughter for starting the blaze.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Blue River Murder
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2010 death of Stephanie Roller, a Colorado mother of three who allegedly went for a walk during a blizzard and was later found dead in a nearby river.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Citizen Jane
programme.desc: When Gertrude McCabe was murdered, her niece Jane Alexander was named her principal beneficiary. Jane, a widow in her 70s, began to suspect that her live-in boyfriend, Tom O'Donnell, might have been involved in the crime.

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Theres more to Dracula than just Bela Lugosi, as the cinemas various incarnations of the carnal count are examined.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Borrowed from the world of fairy tales, giants have been found in stories from Jack and the Beanstalk to Jack the Giant Killer and beyond.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Karloffs career was defined by his sympathetic portrayal of the monster, but others took on this challenging role over the years.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Hammer Films reanimated the Frankenstein franchise in the 1950s with its terrifying teaming of Peter Cushing and Christopher Lee.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevensons classic tale of good and evil has been a filmic favorite since early silent days. Various portrayals of the dual doctor are examined.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Of course theres Lon Chaney Jr. as The Wolf Man, but other films have featured werewolves in surprising ways over the years.

programme.title: The Last Man on Earth
programme.desc: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

programme.title: Tales From The Crypt
programme.desc: Five strangers get lost in a crypt and, after meeting the mysterious Crypt Keeper, receive visions of how they will die. Starring: Joan Collins, Peter Cushing, Ralph Richardson, Geoffrey Bayldon, Martin Boddey

programme.title: Children of the Corn II
programme.desc: A journalist and his son travel to Nebraska to investigate the mysterious town of Gatlin where, unbeknownst to them, a murderous cult of children are still waiting in the corn fields. Starring: Terence Knox, Paul Scherrer, Ryan Bollman

programme.title: The Legend of the Seven Golden Vampires: The Legend of the Seven Golden Vampires
programme.desc: While lecturing in China, Van Helsing agrees to help seven kung fu trained siblings reclaim their ancestral mountain village, now the domain of seven powerful vampires and their army of undead slaves.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Curse of the Red Paw, The
programme.desc: Scott and his family make a trip to Rottenberg, Transylvania in order to reconnect with their past. However, danger lurks when the townspeople seem very spooked by the castle that the family inherited.
programme.sub-title: Curse of the Red Paw, The

programme.title: Teen Wolf: All-American Werewolf, The
programme.desc: The Howards have been selected to be the All-American Family. However, with the press and media watching their every move, the family is concerned their secret will revealed. The family try to make a conscious effort to act as "normal" as possible.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Under My Spell
programme.desc: A new family has moved to Wolverton, and they use their mysterious powers to turn the townspeople into zombies. The only people able to withstand their powers are the Howards.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Punks Out
programme.desc: Scott, Stiles, and Boof head downtown to celebrate Scott's winning touchdown, and Grandma gives him a special potion that will keep him from turning into a werewolf for the night.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: The Curse
programme.desc: Grandma's long time foe, Zazu, places a curse on the family, which turns anyone the Howards touch into a werewolf. Zazu agrees to lift the curse if Scott can give her an old photograph of her and his grandparents.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E8 - I Shrink Therefore I Am
programme.desc: When Moya is raided by bounty hunters working for the Peacekeepers, every crew member is captured except for Crichton and Noranti.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E8 - I Shrink Therefore I Am

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E9 - A Prefect Murder
programme.desc: While Moya and her crew are resupplying on a generally xenophobic planet, Aeryn kills the next prefect while under a strange form of suggestion.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E9 - A Prefect Murder

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E10 - Coup By Clam
programme.desc: The crew consume food, sharing amongst themselves. Although if not ingested by the same person, it becomes toxic.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E10 - Coup By Clam

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E11 - Unrealized Reality
programme.desc: Crichton falls into a wormhole and meets up with a strange man who shows Crichton the consequences of wormhole travel.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E12 - Kansas
programme.desc: After accidentally returning to Earth, Crichton discovers he is in 1985 and he has altered the timeline.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E13 - Terra Firma
programme.desc: Crichton has arrived on Earth. Even though the Moya crew relaxes on Earth and are treated as VIPs, Crichton can't seem to adjust to life on Earth.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E14 - Twice Shy
programme.desc: Moya takes on a new passenger, Talikaa. However, Talikaa turns out to be an alien in disguise and is intent on harvesting the crew's neural energy.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E15 - Mental As Anything
programme.desc: The males of the crew undergo some training. Crichton learns how to resist Scarran probes. While D'Argo learns some self-control.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E15 - Mental As Anything

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E16 - Bringing Home The Beacon
programme.desc: The women of Moya travel to a dead Leviathan to buy a sensor beacon for Moya which will allow her to appear to be a different ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E16 - Bringing Home The Beacon

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E17 - A Constellation Of Doubt
programme.desc: John Crichton struggles to learn the location of the mysterious Katratzi, whilst watching a television documentary about himself and the aliens.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E17 - A Constellation Of Doubt

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E18 - Prayer
programme.desc: Crichton and Scorpius travel to one of the 'unrealized realities' where Crichton believes he heard Stark say 'Katratzi.'

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E19 - We're So Screwed, Part 1: Fetal Attraction
programme.desc: The crew goes after Aeryn on a Scarran controlled station.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E19 - We're So Screwed, Part 1: Fetal Attraction

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E20 - We're So Screwed, Part 2: Hot To Katratzi
programme.desc: Moya arrives at Katratzi. Crichton attends the peace talks between the Scarrans and the Peacekeepers with a nuclear bomb.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E20 - We're So Screwed, Part 2: Hot To Katratzi

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E21 - We're So Screwed, Part 3: La Bomba
programme.desc: Scorpius has betrayed the crew. Now they're all captured. Their plan failed, the crew has little choice but to help Scorpius's true agenda.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E21 - We're So Screwed, Part 3: La Bomba

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E22 - Bad Timing
programme.desc: With their Crystherium stores low, the Scarrans must travel to Earth through a wormhole as those flowers grow there.

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
programme.desc: John Crichton and Aeryn anticipate the birth of their child, only to get caught in the middle of a war that threatens millions of lives.

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
programme.desc: Determined not to let his child be born into a world at war, John Crichton puts himself at the center of the conflict.
